name: Card

dimensions.note: User brief described this as 'Image-top variant'. The Figma node has NO image slot — instead a full-bleed Gradient layer (node 1:247) sits absolutely positioned behind the content with negative insets. Treating as a content-only Article card with a decorative gradient backdrop. If an actual hero image is wanted, it must be added as a new slot (see slots[0] note).

decorativeGradient.note: Recommend re-creating as a CSS gradient using bg-warm/40 → bg-card to avoid shipping a 2x raster. Treat as design polish, not core chrome.

color.gap: Figma uses a 8%-black transparency; project tokens are opaque off-whites. border-border-1 (#f4f4f4) is the closest static neutral. For perfect parity, border-black/[0.08] would be exact but bypasses tokens.

radius.gap: Figma 24.151px; closest project token rounded-2xl is 21.6px. rounded-3xl (26.4px) over-shoots. Off by ~2.5px — visually acceptable.

shadow.gap: Project has NO shadow scale (DESIGN.md 'Elevation & Depth' explicitly notes this). Use Tailwind arbitrary value here. Flag for design-validator: a shadow-sm/md/lg token scale should be added to globals.css.

padding.note: Asymmetric vertical (22 top / 24 bottom) collapsed to symmetric 24px (p-lg). 31.8 horizontal → 32px (p-xl).

innerGap.note: Multiple gap values stack; using gap-3 (12px) and gap-5 (20px) covers them.

slots.name: decorative-gradient
slots.note: Not part of existing Card slot API. Render as an absolutely-positioned ::before or a wrapper <div> inside Card, behind content. Skip on initial build if cost > value.

tokenMapping.fontFamily: font-heading (DM Sans) — Instrument Sans NOT loaded
tokenMapping.lineHeight: leading-[25px] or default text-h5 LH (23px) — Figma's 25px is tight
tokenMapping.colorNote: Figma color #2f4a3e is a custom deep-green not in tokens. text-foreground (#2c2620, warm near-black) is the canonical card title color per DESIGN.md. text-sage (#5d8e7c) is too light. ACCEPT text-foreground.

slots.name: meta-row

tokenMapping.iconColor: text-warm or text-muted-foreground (Figma SVG fill not extracted; assume warm clay #c8a96e family)

slots.slot: GAP — no meta-row helper in existing Card API. Build inline inside CardContent OR introduce a new CardMeta slot. Recommendation: inline <ul> in CardContent for the article variant; only formalize a CardMeta slot if 3+ card variants need it.

tokenMapping.note: Figma uses dashed border in foreground tone at 22% alpha. The project Card's existing CardFooter uses solid `border-t border-border`. This article variant needs DASHED. GAP: CardFooter slot has no divider-style variant — either pass className override (border-dashed border-foreground/20) or add a `variant="dashed"` prop.

slots.name: cta

tokenMapping.fontFamily: font-sans (Host Grotesk) — Manrope NOT loaded; Host Grotesk is the closest geometric humanist sans
tokenMapping.color: text-brand-primary (#009877, EXACT) — also aliased as text-text-brand
tokenMapping.note: Use text-brand-primary; the local --primary (#1f7a5e) is the rendered-app emerald and DESIGN.md says do NOT swap brand-primary and primary interchangeably.

slots.slot: CardFooter (existing slot) — render as a <button>/<Link> child. The right-side empty Container 1:272 (117×23) is reserved space, no content.

slots.name: cta-reserved-right
slots.figmaRaw: 117×23 empty container, justify-self-end inside footer flex
slots.note: Reserved slot in the footer row. Likely future home for a badge/price/tag. Skip on first build; document as a known empty.

fontMapping.rationale: Instrument Sans is NOT loaded in apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx. DM Sans is the project's heading family per DESIGN.md (canonical local-code mapping wins over Figma).
Manrope is NOT loaded. Host Grotesk is the project default body/UI sans — a geometric humanist sans in the same family, used for CTA labels.
Exact match — Figma's meta-row uses DM Sans, which the project loads.

gaps.issue: Project has no shadow/elevation token scale (DESIGN.md 'Elevation & Depth' explicitly empty).
gaps.recommendation: Add shadow-card token (e.g. --shadow-card: 0 4px 48px rgba(226,226,226,0.25)) to globals.css. For now use Tailwind arbitrary shadow-[0_4px_48px_rgba(226,226,226,0.25)].

gaps.issue: Figma 24.151px does not map exactly to any radius token (rounded-2xl = 21.6px, rounded-3xl = 26.4px).
gaps.recommendation: Use rounded-2xl. ~2.5px delta is acceptable; tightening the project scale to include a 24px step is not warranted for one card.

gaps.issue: Figma rgba(0,0,0,0.08) (transparent) vs project border-border-1 #f4f4f4 (opaque) is a near-match but not identical.
gaps.recommendation: Accept border-border-1; only worth fixing if the card sits on non-white surfaces.

gaps.issue: Existing CardFooter is solid border-t; this variant needs dashed at 22% foreground alpha.
gaps.recommendation: Option A (preferred): pass className override on CardFooter for this variant. Option B: add a `divider="dashed" | "solid"` prop to CardFooter.

gaps.issue: No meta-row / inline-list helper slot in existing Card API.
gaps.recommendation: Inline a <ul className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-x-3.5"> inside CardContent. Only formalize a CardMeta slot if 3+ card variants need it.

gaps.issue: Figma title uses Instrument Sans; project does not load it.
gaps.recommendation: Substitute DM Sans (font-heading). Visually adjacent; do NOT add a new font for one card.

gaps.issue: Figma CTA uses Manrope; project does not load it.
Figma ships a raster gradient asset for the card backdrop. No token; would mean shipping a ~50KB image per card.
gaps.recommendation: Replace with a CSS linear-gradient using bg-warm/30 → bg-card OR drop entirely. Mark as polish, not P0.

gaps.issue: Title color is a custom deep-green not in the token palette.
gaps.recommendation: Use text-foreground (#2c2620). DESIGN.md says new raw colors must enter globals.css first.

gaps.issue: User brief described this as 'Image-top variant', but the Figma node 1:246 has NO image slot — only a decorative gradient. Either the wrong Figma node was provided, OR this Article variant intentionally has no image.
gaps.recommendation: Confirm with user: (a) is there a different node for the image-top hero, or (b) is the Article card legitimately image-less and 'image-top' was a misnomer? Building as image-less for now.

proposedJsxNotes: Existing Card has `bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border` defaults — overridden here to border-border-1 to better match Figma's near-transparent border.
CardHeader has `px-6` default — overridden to `px-0` because the Card itself already has px-8 here.
CardFooter has default `border-t border-border bg-muted/40 px-6 py-4` — overridden to transparent bg + dashed border + matching px-0 (card already padded).
Meta-row has no slot. If reused in 3+ variants, promote to <CardMeta /> with separator built-in.
Icons assumed lucide-react; swap to real Figma asset SVGs if/when figma-fetcher resolves them.
extractionNotes: Figma node has no actual image — only a decorative gradient asset behind the content. User brief calls this 'image-top variant'; treating as image-less Article card and flagging as high-severity gap.
Subpixel values (1.098px border, 24.151px radius, 14.271px CTA font) are export artifacts of a scaled Figma frame; rounded to nearest sensible token.
DESIGN.md is the source of truth — local Tailwind tokens win over Figma family attributions where they conflict (per Typography Naming/Role Conflict callout).
